title: T-018 — shipments + shipment_boxes + shipment_box_contents schema + per-org sscc_serial sequence (11-shipping-e)
prompt:
# T-018 — Shipments + SSCC sequence schema

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §9.1 (shipments, shipment_boxes, shipment_box_contents), §6 D-SHP-4 GS1 SSCC-18 Compliance (ADR-004), §13.1 SSCC-18 generation, §11 V-SHIP-PACK-02..04, V-SHIP-SHIP-01..05
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce shipments + boxes + contents schema, status ENUM, RLS via app.current_org_id(), R13 audit + Drizzle, and per-org atomic `sscc_serial_seq` counter (no gaps, V-SHIP-PACK-04).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration creates:
   - ENUM `shipment_status_enum` ('pending','packing','packed','manifested','shipped','delivered','exception').
   - `shipments` (org_id, shipment_number text UNIQUE per org `SH-YYYY-NNNNN`, sales_order_id FK sales_orders, customer_id FK customers, shipping_address_id FK customer_addresses, status shipment_status_enum NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', carrier text (P2 — text only P1, FK in P2 to carriers), service_level text, tracking_number text (P2 API), total_weight_kg numeric(12,3), total_boxes int, dock_door_id uuid (P2), staged_location_id uuid, packed_at, packed_by, shipped_at, shipped_by, delivered_at, bol_pdf_url text, bol_signed_pdf_url text, R13).
   - `shipment_boxes` (org_id, shipment_id FK CASCADE, box_number int, sscc varchar(18) UNIQUE per org, weight_kg numeric(10,3), actual_weight_kg numeric(10,3), length_cm, width_cm, height_cm, tracking_number text (P2), R13; CHECK (sscc ~ '^[0-9]{18}$')).
   - `shipment_box_contents` (org_id, shipment_box_id FK CASCADE, sales_order_line_id FK, product_id uuid, license_plate_id uuid references license_plates (05-WH), lot_number text, quantity numeric(14,3), actual_weight_kg numeric(10,3), R13).
2. RLS + FORCE RLS via app.current_org_id() on all 3 tables.
3. Atomic SSCC serial counter: table `sscc_counters (org_id PK, last_serial bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now())` with row-level lock; Postgres function `next_sscc_serial(p_org_id uuid)` returns bigint by `UPDATE sscc_counters SET last_serial=last_serial+1 WHERE org_id=p_org_id RETURNING last_serial`; row created on first call.
4. Postgres function `sscc_mod10(sscc17 text)` computes GS1 mod-10 check digit; `generate_sscc(p_org_id uuid, p_extension int)` returns the 18-digit string: `extension(1) + gs1_prefix(7-10 from organizations.gs1_company_prefix) + serial_padded(8-N) + mod10`. P1 enforces gs1_prefix length exactly 7 (V-SHIP-PACK-03 7-10 digits — first impl P1 = 7; P2 widens).
5. PG trigger `shipment_number_seq_v1` per-org clone of pick_list_number_seq.
6. Drizzle schema in `packages/db/src/schema/shipping/shipments.ts`.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/00XX_shipping_shipments.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/shipping/shipments.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/shipping-shipments-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fresh DB, when migration runs, then 3 tables + status ENUM + sscc_counters table + 2 functions (next_sscc_serial, sscc_mod10, generate_sscc) exist, with org_id NOT NULL + R13 + RLS + FORCE RLS.
2. Given organizations.gs1_company_prefix is NULL for an org, when generate_sscc is called for that org, then it raises `V-SHIP-PACK-03 missing GS1 company prefix` (Postgres ASSERT or EXCEPTION).
3. Given two concurrent calls to next_sscc_serial for the same org_id, when run, then values increment with no duplicates (UPDATE ... RETURNING lock).
4. Given generate_sscc produces an 18-digit SSCC, when sscc_mod10 is called on the first 17 digits, then it returns the last digit (mod-10 check passes).
5. Given two orgs each call generate_sscc, when each then INSERTs into shipment_boxes, then UNIQUE(org_id, sscc) holds (no cross-org collision but cross-org duplicates allowed since UNIQUE is scoped per org).
6. Given pg_policies inspected, when listed, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() with no GUC reads.

## Test strategy
- RED: testcontainers Postgres concurrency test asserting AC 1-6; seed organizations.gs1_company_prefix; assert mod10 against known GS1 test vectors.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test shipping-shipments-schema`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not use Postgres native nextval() for SSCC serial — atomic per-org counter required (V-SHIP-PACK-04 no gaps).
- Do not compute mod-10 client-side — server-side only (V-SHIP-LBL-03).
- Do not weaken sscc CHECK regex.
- Do not name business-scope column tenant_id.
- Do not read current_setting GUCs.
- Do not omit FORCE RLS.
- Do not cascade DELETE from sales_orders to shipments.

## BRCGS audit trail
All BOL/POD signed documents must store a SHA-256 hash of the uploaded file + retention_until = signed_at + 7 years (BRCGS Issue 9 §3.5 / BRCGS §14.4). Do not allow truncation or premature deletion.

pipeline_inputs.description: Shipments + boxes + contents schema + atomic per-org SSCC serial counter + sscc_mod10/generate_sscc Postgres functions.
pipeline_inputs.details: GS1-128 mod-10 server-side. Per-org sscc_counters row-locked UPDATE for atomicity (no gaps per V-SHIP-PACK-04). gs1_company_prefix sourced from organizations (02-SETTINGS §12.1). Pre-impl: read migrations/ for next free slot.
cross_module_dependencies: 01-npd/T-001 (product FG SSOT — variance_tolerance_pct + allergen attributes; coverage hygiene per R3 audit 2026-05-14)
acceptance_criteria: Given a fresh DB, when migration runs, then 3 tables + status ENUM + sscc_counters + functions (next_sscc_serial, sscc_mod10_check, generate_sscc) exist with org_id NOT NULL + R13 + RLS + FORCE RLS.
Given organizations.gs1_company_prefix is NULL, when generate_sscc runs, then it raises V-SHIP-PACK-03 missing GS1 company prefix error.

Given two concurrent next_sscc_serial calls for same org, when run, then values increment with no duplicates; AND given generate_sscc produces an 18-digit SSCC, when sscc_mod10 is run on first 17 digits, then last digit equals computed check digit (BRCGS SHA-256 audit hash stored alongside).
Given two orgs each call generate_sscc, when each INSERTs into shipment_boxes, then UNIQUE(org_id, sscc) holds; AND pg_policies reference app.current_org_id() with no GUC reads.
test_strategy: RED: testcontainers Postgres concurrency test asserting AC 1-6; mod-10 against GS1 test vectors.
Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test shipping-shipments-schema`.

Do not weaken sscc CHECK regex.
Do not name business-scope column tenant_id.
Do not cascade DELETE from sales_orders.
